ucs.title: [LLM] FIN7 (Carbon Spider / Sangria Tempest) POWERTRASH loader — obfuscated PowerShell from ISO/LNK lure parents
ucs.description: Hunts FIN7's signature POWERTRASH / POWERPLANT PowerShell loader. The crew wraps stage-1 shellcode with -join / -bxor / [Reflection.Assembly]::Load deobfuscation routines and launches it from ISO-mounted LNKs that spawn PowerShell via mshta, wscript, regsvr32, msiexec, or rundll32 — a chain Mandiant/CrowdStrike consistently attribute to GOLD NIAGARA / ITG14.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_process from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" OR Processes.process_name="pwsh.exe") AND NOT Processes.user="*$" AND Processes.parent_process_name IN ("explorer.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","msiexec.exe","cmd.exe","wmic.exe","wmiprvse.exe") AND (Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*-EncodedCommand*" OR Processes.process="* -enc *" OR Processes.process="*-bxor*" OR Processes.process="*-join*" OR Processes.process="*Reflection.Assembly*" OR Processes.process="*[Byte[]]*" OR Processes.process="*[Char[]]*" OR Processes.process="*::Load(*") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | regex process="(?i)(-bxor\s*\d|-join\s*\(|\[byte\[\]\]|\[char\[\]\]|FromBase64String\(|::Load\(|Reflection\.Assembly)" | regex parent_process="(?i)(\.iso|\.img|\.lnk|\.vhd|\\Temp\\|AppData\\Local\\Temp)" OR match(parent_process_name,"(?i)(mshta|wscript|cscript|rundll32|regsvr32)\.exe")
ucs.kql:
// FIN7 POWERTRASH / POWERPLANT loader — obfuscated PS launched from ISO/LNK lure parents
let _suspect_parents = dynamic(["explorer.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","msiexec.exe","cmd.exe","wmic.exe","wmiprvse.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
| where AccountName !endswith "$"                              // strip machine accounts
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_suspect_parents)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("FromBase64String","-EncodedCommand","-enc ","-bxor","-join","Reflection.Assembly","::Load(","[Byte[]]","[Char[]]")
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(-bxor\s*\d|-join\s*\(|\[byte\[\]\]|\[char\[\]\]|FromBase64String\(|::Load\(|Reflection\.Assembly)"
   // FIN7 stages from ISO/IMG mounts or LNK in user-writable temp
| where InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\ProgramData\")
   or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (".iso",".img",".lnk",".vhd",".vhdx")
   or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildImage  = FolderPath,
          ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// FIN7 POWERTRASH / POWERPLANT — ported to SecurityEvent (4688 needs 'Include CmdLine in process create' GPO)
let _suspect_parents = dynamic(["explorer.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","msiexec.exe","cmd.exe","wmic.exe","wmiprvse.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where NewProcessName endswith "powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "pwsh.exe"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where ParentLeaf in (_suspect_parents)
| where CommandLine has_any ("FromBase64String","-EncodedCommand","-enc ","-bxor","-join","Reflection.Assembly","::Load(","[Byte[]]","[Char[]]")
| where CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(-bxor\s*\d|-join\s*\(|\[byte\[\]\]|\[char\[\]\]|FromBase64String\(|::Load\(|Reflection\.Assembly)"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          ParentImage = ParentProcessName,
          ChildImage  = NewProcessName,
          ChildCmd    = CommandLine,
          TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: FIN7 POWERTRASH / POWERPLANT Obfuscated PowerShell Loader
id: a2c1f7d4-fin7-pt01-2026
status: experimental
description: Detects FIN7/Carbon Spider POWERTRASH and POWERPLANT PowerShell loaders launched from ISO/LNK lure parents (mshta/wscript/regsvr32/rundll32/msiexec) using -bxor / -join / Reflection.Assembly::Load deobfuscation routines.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0046/
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/fin7-shim-databases-persistence
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1027.010
  - attack.g0046
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\msiexec.exe'
      - '\wmic.exe'
      - '\wmiprvse.exe'
      - '\explorer.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
  selection_obf:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - ' -enc '
      - '-bxor'
      - '-join'
      - 'Reflection.Assembly'
      - '::Load('
      - '[Byte[]]'
      - '[Char[]]'
  filter_signed_admin:
    User|contains: '$'
  condition: selection_child and selection_parent and selection_obf and not filter_signed_admin
falsepositives:
  - Internal red-team or pentest scripts that legitimately use reflective loading
  - Some packaged installers wrapping PowerShell payloads (rare, allowlist by SHA256)
level: high
ucs.rationale: FIN7's loader chain (POWERTRASH → POWERPLANT → Carbanak/Tirion) is what every major TI vendor uses to attribute the cluster. The combination — ISO/LNK lure spawning a script-host parent (mshta/wscript/regsvr32) which then launches PowerShell with -bxor/-join byte-array reflection — is rare in legitimate enterprise tooling and is the documented house style of GOLD NIAGARA / Sangria Tempest. Generic
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] FIN7 RMM staging — silent Atera / Splashtop / ScreenConnect deployment for ransomware affiliate access
ucs.description: Hunts FIN7's late-stage hand-off pattern: dropping legitimate RMM tooling (Atera with IntegratorLogin/CompanyId, Splashtop Streamer, ScreenConnect, Syncro) for persistent C2 prior to ALPHV/BlackCat / REvil / DarkSide ransomware. CrowdStrike, Microsoft (Sangria Tempest) and Mandiant have all documented this exact handoff in 2022-2024 FIN7 affiliate intrusions.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ( (Processes.process_name="msiexec.exe" AND (Processes.process="*AteraAgent*" OR Processes.process="*IntegratorLogin*" OR Processes.process="*CompanyId=*" OR Processes.process="*AccountId=*" OR Processes.process="*Splashtop_Streamer*" OR Processes.process="*ScreenConnect.ClientSetup*" OR Processes.process="*SyncroSetup*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("AteraAgent.exe","SplashtopStreamer.exe","SRService.exe","AnyDesk.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","SyncroService.exe") AND Processes.parent_process_name IN ("msiexec.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe")) ) AND NOT Processes.user="*$" by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename firstTime as install_first lastTime as install_last | eval install_first=strftime(install_first,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), install_last=strftime(install_last,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
ucs.kql:
// FIN7 ransomware-affiliate RMM staging (Atera w/ IntegratorLogin, Splashtop, ScreenConnect, Syncro)
let _rmm_bins = dynamic(["AteraAgent.exe","SplashtopStreamer.exe","SRService.exe","AnyDesk.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","SyncroService.exe"]);
let _suspect_launchers = dynamic(["msiexec.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe"]);
let _msi_install = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName =~ "msiexec.exe"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("AteraAgent","IntegratorLogin","CompanyId=","AccountId=","Splashtop_Streamer","ScreenConnect.ClientSetup","SyncroSetup")
    | extend Stage = "MSI silent install";
let _proc_run = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ (_rmm_bins)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_suspect_launchers)
    | extend Stage = "RMM binary launched by scripting host";
union _msi_install, _proc_run
   // anti-baseline: suppress hosts where RMM has been running >14d already (legitimate fleet)
| join kind=leftanti (
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp between (ago(60d) .. ago(14d))
    | where FileName in~ (_rmm_bins)
    | summarize by DeviceName
  ) on DeviceName
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, Stage,
          FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// FIN7 RMM staging — Sentinel SecurityEvent EID 4688 (cmdline auditing required)
let _rmm_bins = dynamic(["AteraAgent.exe","SplashtopStreamer.exe","SRService.exe","AnyDesk.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","SyncroService.exe"]);
let _suspect_launchers = dynamic(["msiexec.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe"]);
let _msi_install =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName endswith "msiexec.exe"
    | where CommandLine has_any ("AteraAgent","IntegratorLogin","CompanyId=","AccountId=","Splashtop_Streamer","ScreenConnect.ClientSetup","SyncroSetup")
    | extend Stage = "MSI silent install";
let _proc_run =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1]))
    | extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
    | where ChildLeaf in (_rmm_bins)
    | where ParentLeaf in (_suspect_launchers)
    | extend Stage = "RMM binary launched by scripting host";
union _msi_install, _proc_run
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, Stage, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: FIN7 / Carbon Spider Silent RMM Tool Deployment (Atera / Splashtop / ScreenConnect)
id: 5c5e34a2-fin7-rmm-2026
status: experimental
description: Detects silent install or scripted launch of legitimate RMM tools (Atera with IntegratorLogin/CompanyId, Splashtop Streamer, ScreenConnect, Syncro) characteristic of FIN7/Sangria Tempest staging prior to ALPHV/BlackCat or REvil ransomware deployment.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0046/
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/05/09/ransomware-as-a-service-understanding-the-cybercrime-gig-economy/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.t1219
  - attack.g0046
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_msi:
    Image|endswith: '\msiexec.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'AteraAgent'
      - 'IntegratorLogin'
      - 'CompanyId='
      - 'AccountId='
      - 'Splashtop_Streamer'
      - 'ScreenConnect.ClientSetup'
      - 'SyncroSetup'
  selection_proc:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\AteraAgent.exe'
      - '\SplashtopStreamer.exe'
      - '\SRService.exe'
      - '\AnyDesk.exe'
      - '\ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe'
      - '\SyncroService.exe'
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\msiexec.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
  filter_machine_acct:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (selection_msi or selection_proc) and not filter_machine_acct
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned MSP / IT helpdesk deployments — allowlist by deployment source host or installer SHA256
  - Legitimate RMM software lifecycle within an MSP-managed fleet
level: high
ucs.rationale: FIN7's pivot to ransomware-affiliate work (CrowdStrike GOLD NIAGARA, Microsoft Sangria Tempest, Mandiant UNC1878 overlaps) consistently uses Atera with embedded IntegratorLogin / CompanyId tokens, Splashtop Streamer, and ScreenConnect for persistence and lateral hand-off to ALPHV/BlackCat operators. Atera's IntegratorLogin/CompanyId arguments are publicly documented FIN7 IOCs (Microsoft DART 2022,
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
